1.description: (Color online) Investors’ Equity Stakes and Equity Shares Notes. This figure considers a startup with four investors with initial endowments, 𝑊 1 0 = 𝑊 2 0 = 𝑊 3 0 = 𝑊 4 0 = 2 5 W 10 = W 20 = W 30 = W 40 = 25 , and heterogeneous risk aversion, 𝛾 1 = 0 . 8 , 𝛾 2 = 2 , 𝛾 3 = 3 , γ 1 = 0.8 , γ 2 = 2 , γ 3 = 3 , and 𝛾 4 = 9 γ 4 = 9 . Lead investor 1 has all bargaining power. Panels (a) and (b) plot, respectively, investors’ book equity stakes ( ˜ 𝑊 𝑖 ⁢ 𝑡 W ˜ i ⁢ t ), and book equity shares ( 𝜙 𝑖 ⁢ 𝑡 ≡ ˜ 𝑊 𝑖 ⁢ 𝑡 / ⁢ 𝑊 𝑡 ϕ i ⁢ t ≡ W ˜ i ⁢ t / ⁢ W t ) as functions of the firm’s total book equity W t . The small window inside (a) zooms in on the individual book equity stakes when W t is relatively small. The parameter values are r = 0.03, 𝜇 = 0 . 6 , 𝜎 = 0 . 8 9 , 𝜌 = 0 . 1 , 𝜉 = 0 . 6 4 , 𝛽 = 0 . 9 𝜉 = 0 . 5 7 6 μ = 0.6 , σ = 0.89 , ρ = 0.1 , ξ = 0.64 , β = 0.9 ξ = 0.576 .
